name: Ivan Lavruk
tagline: Frontend Developer with experience building responsive React applications, integrating REST APIs, and working in modern team environments.
title: Frontend Developer | React | TypeScript

bullets: Development of web interfaces using React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.

Writing and maintaining frontend documentation and coding guidelines.
Collaboration with backend and product teams.

summary:
Frontend Developer with commercial experience in React and TypeScript, currently gaining hands-on experience. I build responsive interfaces, integrate REST APIs, and work with modern frontend tooling, Cypress testing, and backend fundamentals such as Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL.

My background spans product development, WordPress/UI implementation, QA automation, and team-based training programs, which helps me ship practical, user-focused interfaces and collaborate effectively in modern workflows.
